title: Move time button to below Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls

requirements.summary: Duplicate the time button from the fixed right bottom panel to the left-side controls panel, positioned directly below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone toggle controls
acceptanceCriteria: The time button appears in the left-side controls panel, directly below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls.
Clicking the time button in its new position behaves identically to clicking it in the original right bottom panel (same state change, same visual feedback).
The time button still exists in the right bottom panel (it is not removed in this step — only moved/duplicated as the first incremental step).
No existing controls in the left-side panel are displaced or broken by the addition.
The new button styling is consistent with the surrounding controls.

file_operations.description: Locate the time button UI element in the fixed right bottom panel (the button with clock icon and 'Pause Time' / 'Resume Time' text). Add a duplicate of this button in the left-side controls panel positioned directly below the 'Day/Night Terminator' and 'Twilight Zone' toggle buttons. The duplicated button must use the same onClick handler (toggleTimeAnimation), the same state bindings (isTimeAnimating), and maintain visual consistency with the surrounding left panel controls. Ensure the button in the right bottom panel remains unchanged for this incremental step.
